CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) FROM test_array WHERE arr = [1, 2, 3];
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) AS is_non_empty FROM test_array WHERE is_non_empty = 1;
SELECT id, notEmpty(arr) FROM (SELECT id, arr FROM test_array WHERE id IN (1, 4));
CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str Array(String));
SELECT id, notEmpty(str) AS has_elements FROM test_strings WHERE has_elements = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_combined AS SELECT t.id, notEmpty(t.arr) AS is_non_empty FROM test_array t;
CREATE TABLE nested_example AS SELECT id, notEmpty((SELECT arr FROM test_array WHERE id = test_array.id)) FROM test_array;
SELECT * FROM nested_example WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_array WHERE notEmpty(arr));
SELECT t.id, notEmpty(t.arr) AS is_non_empty FROM (SELECT id, arr FROM test_array) AS t HAVING is_non_empty = 1;
